My Jekyll Blog
Home About Newsletter

About This Blog

Welcome to my personal blog where I share thoughts on web development, technology, and digital life. This blog is built with Jekyll and features seamless newsletter integration powered by Buttondown.

What You’ll Find Here

  • Web Development: Tips, tutorials, and insights about modern web development
  • Technology: Reviews and thoughts on the latest tech trends
  • Personal Projects: Showcasing interesting projects and experiments
  • Industry Insights: Commentary on the tech industry and its evolution

Newsletter

I publish a weekly newsletter featuring:

  • Curated web development resources
  • Personal insights and learnings
  • Project updates and announcements
  • Industry news and analysis

The newsletter is powered by Buttondown, a privacy-focused email platform that respects your inbox and your data.

📧 Enjoyed this post?

Subscribe to my newsletter to get more content like this delivered to your inbox.

No spam, unsubscribe at any time. Powered by Buttondown.

About the Author

[Add your bio here - replace this with information about yourself, your background, and your expertise.]

Technical Details

This blog is built with:

  • Jekyll - Static site generator
  • Buttondown - Newsletter service
  • GitHub Pages - Hosting (optional)
  • Markdown - Content writing

The source code is available on GitHub, and contributions are welcome!

Contact

Feel free to reach out via email or social media if you have questions, suggestions, or just want to say hello.
